name: MirrorLoop Recurrent Core + LexLoRE
author: Corben Sorenson
status: non-record art submission; not claimed as SOTA or statistically significant official record
notes: Best preserved under-cap 8xH100 exported-reload result for the MirrorLoop Recurrent Core + LexLoRE family. Prime-skip MirrorLoop reached 1.35504224 BPB on 1xH100 and is documented as the strongest late architecture signal, not the main submitted 8x score.
